name: knowledge-capture
description: Capture agent decisions, evidence, changes, and next steps as local Markdown.

interface.shortDescription: Capture agent decisions, evidence, changes, and next steps as local Markdown.
interface.longDescription: Knowledge Capture helps coding agents preserve task context, decisions, evidence, changes, and next steps in local Markdown captures that can later feed a vault, wiki, or knowledge base.
defaultPrompt: Create a handoff note for this work.
